creator: woodsb02@freebsd.org
text:
Hi Bryce,

Thanks for submitting this, it is now committed without any changes. It was good work!

One minor comment: shar files are normally used for submitting new ports, where as existing ports should instead have a diff attached to bug reports. The best way to do this is to have an svn checkout, and modify the port directly in the tree, finally using "svn diff" to create the patch (checking everything is included with "svn status" first).

Thanks again for your contribution.
-Ben
